business.name: Pro Plumbing Solutions
hero.title: Fast, Reliable Plumbing Services You Can Trust
hero.subtitle: From leaky faucets to full pipe replacements — our licensed plumbers deliver quality workmanship with upfront pricing. Available 24/7 for emergencies.
trustBar.title: Trusted by Homeowners
services.title: Plumbing Services & Pricing
services.subtitle: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Every job includes a detailed quote before we start.
services.items.leakDetection.title: Leak Detection
services.items.leakDetection.description: Advanced leak detection using thermal imaging and acoustic equipment. We find hidden leaks fast to prevent water damage.
services.items.drainCleaning.title: Drain Cleaning
services.items.drainCleaning.description: Professional drain cleaning and unclogging using hydro-jetting and mechanical snaking for stubborn blockages.
services.items.waterHeater.title: Water Heater Service
services.items.waterHeater.description: Installation, repair, and maintenance of tankless and traditional water heaters. All major brands serviced.
services.items.pipeRepair.title: Pipe Repair & Replacement
services.items.pipeRepair.description: Burst pipe repair, repiping, and trenchless pipe replacement. We fix it right the first time with lasting results.
services.items.emergency.title: 24/7 Emergency Plumbing
services.items.emergency.description: Burst pipes, overflows, and gas leaks — we respond within 60 minutes, day or night. No extra charges for weekends.
services.items.estimates.title: Free Estimates
services.items.estimates.description: On-site consultation to assess your plumbing needs and provide a detailed, no-obligation estimate.
process.title: Simple 4-Step Process
process.subtitle: From your first call to a guaranteed repair — here's how we work.
process.steps.0.title: Call Us
process.steps.0.description: Call or book online. We'll schedule a visit at a time that works for you.
process.steps.1.title: We Diagnose
process.steps.1.description: Our licensed plumber inspects the issue and provides an upfront quote.
process.steps.2.title: We Fix It
process.steps.2.description: Approved repairs are completed efficiently using quality parts and materials.
process.steps.3.title: Guaranteed
process.steps.3.description: Every job is backed by our satisfaction guarantee and full warranty.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real reviews from satisfied homeowners
testimonials.items.0.author: James W.
testimonials.items.0.text: Had a burst pipe at 2am — they were here within 45 minutes and had it fixed before sunrise. Professional, clean, and fairly priced. Highly recommend!
testimonials.items.1.author: Sarah M.
testimonials.items.1.text: We've used them for both our home and rental properties. Always on time, excellent work quality, and they clean up after themselves.
testimonials.items.2.author: Robert K.
testimonials.items.2.text: Their maintenance plan has saved us thousands in potential repairs. Great value and their plumbers are always courteous and knowledgeable.
about.title: About Us
about.story.title: Built on Craftsmanship
about.story.content: With over 15 years of hands-on plumbing experience, we've built our reputation on quality workmanship, honest pricing, and reliable service. What started as a one-person operation has grown into a trusted team of licensed plumbers serving residential and commercial clients across the region. We treat every job — big or small — with the same level of care and attention to detail.
about.commitment.title: Our Guarantee
about.commitment.content: Every job is backed by our workmanship guarantee. If something isn't right, we'll come back and make it right — no questions asked. We're fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind.
